title: Molo seed
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Profogg.jpg|thumb|150px|A profogg surrounded by underground molo seeds.]]
'''Molo seeds''' were seeds that grew underground on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They were a major source of food for [[Profogg/Legends|profoggs]].

{{Flora-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-11-XX -->''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''
